metadata.title: Product Bricks
metadata.description: Hierarchical product brick map for the bike-mobility domain.

children.name: Employer Policy & Program Management
children.description: Configures employer-level mobility programs including subsidy logic, plan design, market variations, approval rules, and policy governance.

internalModules.title: Rules and Configuration Model
internalModules.description: Defines the configurable policies, thresholds, and business rules for Employer Policy & Program Management.

internalModules.title: Decision Evaluation Engine
internalModules.description: Executes policy and pricing decisions in real time within Employer Policy & Program Management.

internalModules.title: Simulation and Override Controls
internalModules.description: Supports testing, exceptions, and operator overrides for Employer Policy & Program Management.

interfaces.title: Decision API
interfaces.description: API that returns policy, quote, or eligibility outcomes calculated by Employer Policy & Program Management.

interfaces.title: Configuration Workspace
interfaces.description: Operational interface for managing rules, policies, and overrides in Employer Policy & Program Management.

interfaces.title: Policy Change Events
interfaces.description: Event stream that communicates policy updates and decision outcomes from Employer Policy & Program Management.

children.name: Quote, Subsidy & Savings Configurator
children.description: Calculates rider and employer cost scenarios, subsidy rules, and savings projections before enrollment or policy changes.

internalModules.title: Rules and Configuration Model
internalModules.description: Defines the configurable policies, thresholds, and business rules for Quote, Subsidy & Savings Configurator.

internalModules.title: Decision Evaluation Engine
internalModules.description: Executes policy and pricing decisions in real time within Quote, Subsidy & Savings Configurator.

internalModules.title: Simulation and Override Controls
internalModules.description: Supports testing, exceptions, and operator overrides for Quote, Subsidy & Savings Configurator.

interfaces.title: Decision API
interfaces.description: API that returns policy, quote, or eligibility outcomes calculated by Quote, Subsidy & Savings Configurator.

interfaces.title: Configuration Workspace
interfaces.description: Operational interface for managing rules, policies, and overrides in Quote, Subsidy & Savings Configurator.

interfaces.title: Policy Change Events
interfaces.description: Event stream that communicates policy updates and decision outcomes from Quote, Subsidy & Savings Configurator.

children.name: Eligibility, Payroll & HRIS Sync
children.description: Synchronizes employee eligibility, payroll deductions, employment events, and employer master data with HR and payroll systems.

internalModules.title: Contract and Mapping Layer
internalModules.description: Maintains schemas, field mappings, and versioned contracts used by Eligibility, Payroll & HRIS Sync.

internalModules.title: Transformation and Routing Engine
internalModules.description: Transforms messages and routes requests or events through Eligibility, Payroll & HRIS Sync.

internalModules.title: Access and Observability Controls
internalModules.description: Applies authentication, throttling, retry handling, and monitoring for Eligibility, Payroll & HRIS Sync.

interfaces.title: Inbound API
interfaces.description: API entry point used to submit requests or payloads into Eligibility, Payroll & HRIS Sync.

interfaces.title: Outbound Event Feed
interfaces.description: Event or webhook surface used by Eligibility, Payroll & HRIS Sync to publish downstream updates.

interfaces.title: Partner Connector Surface
interfaces.description: Connector interface for external systems exchanging data through Eligibility, Payroll & HRIS Sync.

children.name: Bike Catalog & Recommendation
children.description: Presents bike, accessory, and package choices with recommendation logic based on commute profile, employer policy, and local availability.

internalModules.title: Catalog and Index Pipeline
internalModules.description: Builds and refreshes the searchable corpus, facets, and metadata used by Bike Catalog & Recommendation.

internalModules.title: Ranking and Recommendation Engine
internalModules.description: Ranks results or recommendations surfaced by Bike Catalog & Recommendation.

internalModules.title: Merchandising and Tuning Controls
internalModules.description: Lets operators tune relevance, boosts, and presentation behavior in Bike Catalog & Recommendation.

interfaces.title: Search and Query API
interfaces.description: API used to query results, recommendations, or catalog slices from Bike Catalog & Recommendation.

interfaces.title: Search Experience Interface
interfaces.description: User-facing search or browse experience rendered by Bike Catalog & Recommendation.

interfaces.title: Catalog Update Feed
interfaces.description: Event or ingestion feed used to refresh searchable content inside Bike Catalog & Recommendation.

children.name: Order Orchestration & Checkout
children.description: Runs the end-to-end ordering flow including approvals, signatures, reservations, order routing, and state transitions.

internalModules.title: Workflow and State Engine
internalModules.description: Orchestrates the main lifecycle, state transitions, and task flow handled by Order Orchestration & Checkout.

internalModules.title: Capacity and Exception Management
internalModules.description: Manages inventory, reservations, workload, and exception handling inside Order Orchestration & Checkout.

internalModules.title: Operations Console Logic
internalModules.description: Supports operator actions, escalations, and manual interventions required by Order Orchestration & Checkout.

interfaces.title: Workflow API
interfaces.description: API for starting, updating, or querying operational workflows managed by Order Orchestration & Checkout.

interfaces.title: Operator Console
interfaces.description: User interface for task handling, interventions, and operational control within Order Orchestration & Checkout.

interfaces.title: Lifecycle Status Events
interfaces.description: Event stream exposing state changes and exceptions produced by Order Orchestration & Checkout.

children.name: Rider Identity, Wallet & App Experience
children.description: Provides rider login, document wallet, order and claim visibility, support entry points, and self-service lifecycle actions.

internalModules.title: Identity and Policy Engine
internalModules.description: Authenticates actors, evaluates access policies, and manages trust rules for Rider Identity, Wallet & App Experience.

internalModules.title: Entitlements and Lifecycle Management
internalModules.description: Manages roles, permissions, account state, and lifecycle changes within Rider Identity, Wallet & App Experience.

internalModules.title: Audit and Compliance Controls
internalModules.description: Records security-relevant actions and compliance evidence produced by Rider Identity, Wallet & App Experience.

interfaces.title: Authentication API
interfaces.description: Programmatic interface for authentication, authorization, or account checks exposed by Rider Identity, Wallet & App Experience.

interfaces.title: Administration Console
interfaces.description: Operational interface for managing identity settings and access policies in Rider Identity, Wallet & App Experience.

interfaces.title: Audit Event Stream
interfaces.description: Event interface that publishes security and compliance signals from Rider Identity, Wallet & App Experience.

children.name: Dealer & Service Partner Network Management

interfaces.title: Partner Lifecycle Events
interfaces.description: Event stream carrying onboarding, status, and performance changes from Dealer & Service Partner Network Management.

children.name: Contract Lifecycle Management

children.name: Settlement, Invoicing & Payroll Reconciliation
children.description: Handles employer invoicing, payroll deduction reconciliation, dealer settlement, and dispute-aware financial controls.

internalModules.title: Transaction and Ledger Core
internalModules.description: Records the core financial or commercial transactions handled by Settlement, Invoicing & Payroll Reconciliation.

internalModules.description: Matches external outcomes, balances, and exceptions flowing through Settlement, Invoicing & Payroll Reconciliation.

children.name: Remarketing, Refurbishment & Resale

interfaces.title: Interaction Event Stream
